title: The Complete Drop Multiplier
description: Multiply what every block, mob, and fish drops, x4, x16, or x64. Default is x4. Switch tiers mid-game.
body:
# The Complete Drop Multiplier

Every block now drops way more than it should. Set it to x4 for a gentle boost, or crank it to x64 and watch your inventory overflow in seconds. Switch between tiers any time - your setting saves automatically.

## Features
- **x4, x16, x64** multiplier tiers - switch any time
- **1000+ blocks** all affected
- **Mob drops** are multiplied too
- **Fishing** drops are multiplied too
- **Archaeology** yields are multiplied too
- **Gameplay drops** (Hero of the Village gifts, piglin bartering, cat gifts, and more) are multiplied too
- **Default x4** - only set if not already configured, so safe to reload
- Works in survival, no cheats required

## How to use
1. Install the datapack
2. Load your world
3. Start breaking things, killing mobs, fishing, and brushing pots
4. Run `/function multiplied:set_x4`, `/function multiplied:set_x16` or `/function multiplied:set_x64` to change the tier

## Notes
- Compatible with Minecraft 26.1.2
- Pure datapack - no mods, no executables

If you make a video using this datapack, a credit or link back to this page would be appreciated!
